name: Sampo Koski
description:
Make your own story!
REQUEST

╰┈➤ Want a recently updated, lore-accurate bot where you can narrate the story in any way you want? Well, look no further, friend! This bot includes story-accurate lore, precise character personality, and a lot of flavor that is sure to spice up the story you want to achieve.

· · ─ ·𖥸· ─ · ·

ＩＭＰＯＲＴＡＮＴ

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

All of my bots are meant to be used with the JANITOR LLM. I have not tested with anything else. Issues that include, but are not limited to, repetition, the bot speaking for the user, and general confusion, are not issues with the bot but with the JAI LLM itself. THESE ARE ISSUES I CANNOT FIX. Please keep that in mind when leaving feedback. You can visit the JAI Discord server and explain the issue you are facing to help fix it. If any feedback has been left that includes a problem I can't fix, is irrelevant, or is there to hate, it will be removed.

I do NOT consent to the reposting of ANY of my bots. Stolen bots will be reported to devs and promptly removed.


I take bot requests! Please read the requirements before putting in a request.

Request bots here (Google Forms)
